purpose: Procedural faceted crystal generation by chaining TWO R28 solver stacks with Legacy Boole as the deformer slot. First pass cuts vertical tips; second pass cuts horizontal bands; final result wrapped in Fracture+Random+Force MoGraph dynamics.
visual_result: Cylinder evolves into a faceted crystal shape over the 130-frame timeline (FPS=250 = iteration counter). Each frame is one Boolean cut from a spinning cube; cuts accumulate into crystal-like topology.
input_geometry: Cylinder (Init State of first solver) → cut and re-cut to produce the crystal.

hosts.om_name: Store for next Frame (×2 — one per solver)
hosts.role: memory@ container, identical to scene 09's pattern

om_classic_generators.name: Tip Cutting / Horizontal Cutting Cutting Cube
Random Angle (×2)
om_classic_generators.role: randomizes Spin rotation per frame for non-uniform faceting

om_classic_generators.name: Init State (×2)
om_classic_generators.role: frame-0 seed (Cylinder for first; Solved State Instance for second — CHAINING)

om_classic_generators.name: Solved State (×2)
om_classic_generators.role: per-frame solver wrap, contains Legacy Boole

om_classic_generators.name: Legacy Boole (×2)
om_classic_generators.role: THE DEFORMER SLOT — Boolean A∖B subtraction; A=previous-frame state, B=Cutting Cube

om_classic_generators.name: Solved State Instance (Init State of second solver)
om_classic_generators.role: Connect Instance linking Horizontal Cutting's input to Tip Cutting's output — THE CHAINING MECHANISM

om_classic_generators.name: Connect (top-level)
om_classic_generators.role: wraps final output for MoGraph dynamics

om_classic_generators.name: Fracture
om_classic_generators.role: MoGraph fracture splits crystal into pieces

doc_level_objects.name: RS Area Light + BG plane + Bouncecard

key_connections.to: Horizontal Cutting Init State (via Connect Instance INSTANCEOBJECT_LINK)
key_connections.purpose: R28 SOLVER CHAINING — output of first solver becomes seed of second.

key_connections.to: Store for next Frame Instance (previous frame state)
key_connections.purpose: A in A∖B — the geometry to subtract from.
B in A∖B — the shape to subtract.

what_is_clever: Boolean as the swappable deformer slot — proves R28 universality extends to Boolean operations.
R28 solvers CHAIN via Connect Instance INSTANCEOBJECT_LINK — output of one feeds input of next. Recipe candidate R29.
FPS=250 with max=130 = high iteration count packed into short timeline. Frame number = iteration index.
Spinning cutter primitive (Cube nested in Spin/Angel/Move-Down nulls) generates rotational Boolean cuts → faceted geometry.
Three compositional layers (R28 foundation + R29 chaining + MoGraph wrap) — recipes stack cleanly without monolithic megagraphs.
rebuild_recipe: See study.md for full prose recipe — too long for record.json field.

minimal_reproducible_subgraph.name: chained_solver_stacks
minimal_reproducible_subgraph.purpose: Chain N R28 solver stacks where each stack's seed is the previous stack's solved output. Multi-stage iterative geometry pipeline.
minimal_reproducible_subgraph.node_count: ~12 OM objects per solver × N solvers + 5-node Nodes Mesh × N
minimal_reproducible_subgraph.value_proposition: THE pattern for multi-stage procedural geometry pipelines. Stage 1 = Boolean cuts; Stage 2 = Smoothing; Stage 3 = Displacement; etc. Each stage's solver runs independently; final result is composition.
secondary_recipes: R28b_boolean_deformer_slot — R28 with Legacy Boole as slot deformer
R30_spinning_cutter_primitive — Cube + Spin/Angel/Move-Down nulls for rotational Boolean cutting
R31_iteration_count_via_fps — high FPS + short timeline as iteration counter
R32_mograph_dynamics_wrap — Fracture + Random + Force wrap for any procedural mesh
